records.ety: [OE. kirtel, curtel, AS. cyrtel; skin to Icel. kyrtill, Sw. kjortel, Dan. kiortel, kiole.]

defs: A garment varying in form and use at different times, and worn both by men and women.
quotes: Wearing her Norman car, and her kirtle of blue.
notes: ☞ The term is still retained in the provinces, in the sense of “an outer petticoat.”
